---
title: "BPMEraAdjust_V2"
author: "Ethan Mathew"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(fullhouse)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# LOAD DATA
# ---------------------------------------------------

talent_pool <- read.csv("talent_pool_estimation/talent_pool.csv") %>%
  mutate(talent_pool = talent_pool * 1000000) %>%
  rename(season = year)

df <- read.csv(
  "basketball_reference_scraper/data/nba_advanced_1950_2025.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# CLEAN DATA
# ---------------------------------------------------

df_clean <- df %>%
  filter(ranker != "Rk") %>%
  filter(!grepl("League", name_display)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(name_display),
         name_display != "",
         name_display != "Player") %>%
  filter(!is.na(team_name_abbr),
         team_name_abbr != "",
         team_name_abbr != "Team") %>%
  mutate(
    age   = as.numeric(age),
    games = as.numeric(games),
    mp    = as.numeric(mp),
    bpm   = as.numeric(bpm)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bpm), mp >= 500, games >= 30)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# HANDLE MULTI TEAM SEASONS (TOT ROWS)
# ---------------------------------------------------

df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(name_display, season) %>%
  mutate(has_tot = any(team_name_abbr == "TOT")) %>%
  filter(!(has_tot & team_name_abbr != "TOT")) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  select(-has_tot) %>%
  ungroup()
```
